business_ideas.idea: Southern Sam's Sticky Icky: low-sugar ketchup and sauce brand
Disneyland-style theme park for dogs with entertainment
Religious-themed theme park similar to Holy Land Experience
Unbundled experiences from theme parks (parade services, photo ops)
Creator camp: sleepaway camp to learn online content creation
Low-sugar condiment products on UberEats to test demand
Athlete-led training resort or camp experience

predictions.text: Health-conscious consumers will pay premium for low-sugar versions of condiments like ketchup
Out-of-home experiences will boom as digital fatigue increases post-pandemic
